text.title: Strategy Analysis — Current State — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are process/system/capability owners available and is the engagement in scope for as-is?

branch.when: engagement_greenfield == false AND owners_available == true AND existing_spec_age < 90d

example.trace: ENG-42 → owners available → spec 200d old → produce new current-state spec
